text_preview:
- 01. REG. n 091

- 02. PLACE: Highway PA-17 – (Belém-Mosqueiro – PA)

- 03. DATE / TIME: FEB 13, 78 – 11:40 pm

- 04. DESCRIPTION: luminous body [CL]

- 05. COLOR: Reddish yellow

- 06. SHAPE: Undefined

- 07. APPARENT SIZE: 15 cm

- 08 MOVEMENT: Straight trajectory, Northwest / Southeast direction in zig-zag)

- 09. SPEED: Low (-200 Km / h), when cutting the highway, accelerated.

- 10. ALTITUDE: 500 m (estimated)

- 11. DISTANCE: 1,000 m (estimated), at the point closest to your route.

- 12. OBSERVER (S): V. MELLO (Pilot) and A. MELLO (Engineer).

- 13. NOTE: Upon reaching BR-316 [Highway]
summary: Operação Prato reports 091–100: ten luminous-body sightings Feb–Mar 1978 in Pará around Colares, recorded by military ICOMAR team with supersonic maneuvers and color-changing blue flashes.
